title: Preview Your File Before Asking AI Any Questions
summary: Thirty seconds in preview prevents thirty minutes explaining wrong AI answers in a meeting.

content.summary: Thirty seconds in preview prevents thirty minutes explaining wrong AI answers in a meeting.

body.text: AI reads what you uploaded literally—garbled headers become garbled logic. Row count jumps or drops versus last week. New columns appear. Dates import as text.

body.alt: Abstract visualization representing AI and data
body.caption: Abstract visualization representing AI and data. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Row count jumps or drops versus last week. New columns appear. Dates import as text. Currency columns include symbols that block sums.
Fix upstream or adjust filters before any Talk to Data session so questions target clean fields.

items: Compare row count to prior upload before asking totals.
Confirm amount columns are numeric in preview.
Scan sample rows for duplicate keys.

body.text: Make preview mandatory in team playbooks—the same way you would not pivot a sheet you have not opened.
Preview discipline compounds: fewer mismatches, faster trust in AI assists.
Datilio's preview-first UX is the gate that makes file-grounded AI reliable.

meta_description: Thirty seconds in preview prevents thirty minutes explaining wrong AI answers in a meeting.
meta_keywords: Preview, Upload, AI Readiness, Best Practice
